title: MikroTik G1483-0600WNB - Hot Swap 600W power supply for CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM
description: Hot-swap 54.5V 10.35A power supply for the CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM PoE++ switch. The switch comes with a single 600W PSU and an expansion slot for a second PSU that can raise the total power output all the way to 1150 Watts , up to 90 Watts per PoE++ port
